g.onclick: sendPrompt('What types of yarn are used in woven fabric manufacturing?')
sendPrompt('How does the weaving process work in fabric production?')
sendPrompt('What properties does woven fabric have?')
sendPrompt('How is woven fabric cut in garment production?')
sendPrompt('What sewing techniques are used for woven fabric?')
sendPrompt('What polymers are used in non-woven fabric production?')
sendPrompt('How is polymer melted in non-woven fabric production?')
sendPrompt('What is the extrusion process in non-woven manufacturing?')
sendPrompt('How are fibers formed in non-woven fabric?')
sendPrompt('What bonding methods are used in non-woven fabric?')
